name: kawaii-vscode-color
description: Dark pink and light green pastel-pink VS Code themes with optional glow effects, image-backed editor styling, color customization, Settings Sync, and JSON import/export.
author: EmmiiChan

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:dom && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:check: node --check scripts/build-color-theme.js && node --check scripts/increment-package-version.js && node --check scripts/require-e2e-neon-flag.js && node --check scripts/run-e2e.js && node --check scripts/run-test-all.js && node --check src/emptyEditorLogoStyles.js && node --check src/extension.js && node --check src/settings.js && node --check src/settingsWebview.js && node --check src/workbenchPatch.js && node --check src/js/theme_template.js && node --check test/e2e/.mocharc.js && node --check test/e2e/.mocharc.neon.js && node --check test/e2e/.mocharc.neon-apply.js && node --check test/e2e/.mocharc.neon-applied.js && node --check test/e2e/.mocharc.neon-restored.js && node --check test/e2e/helpers/extester-app.js && node --check test/e2e/vscode-launcher.spec.js && node --check test/e2e/settings-webview.spec.js && node --check test/e2e/settings-safe-flows.spec.js && node --check test/e2e/neon-real.spec.js

kawaii_synthwave.brightness.description: Set the brightness value for the glow effect. 0.0 is fully transparent and 1.0 is fully bright

kawaii_synthwave.disableGlow.description: Disable the glow effect, but show Kawaii VS Code Color editor chrome updates
